sessionManager.title: Session Management
sessionManager.description: View and manage devices connected to your account

revokeAllConfirm.title: Confirm Revoke All Other Sessions
revokeAllConfirm.description: You will be signed out of all other devices ({count} devices). Only this current session will remain active.

passwordBreach.safe: Password has not appeared in any known data breaches
passwordBreach.breached: This password appeared in {count} data breaches
passwordBreach.breachedCritical: Critical warning! This password appeared in over 1 million data breaches!
passwordBreach.breachedHigh: Warning! This password appeared in {count} data breaches
passwordBreach.recommendation: We recommend choosing a different password to keep your account secure

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account

setup.title: Set up Two-Factor Authentication
setup.step1: Download an authenticator app like Google Authenticator
setup.step2: Scan the QR code or enter the key manually
setup.step3: Enter the code from the app to verify

backupCodes.title: Backup Codes
backupCodes.description: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Sign in quickly and securely using Face ID or fingerprint

register.title: Register New Passkey
register.description: Use Face ID or fingerprint to register
register.name: Passkey Name

device.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey?

activityLog.title: Activity Log
activityLog.description: Track all security activities on your account

stepUp.title: Additional Verification Required
stepUp.description: We detected unusual activity. Please verify your identity
